Ethan Ewing has shown no fear on his return to the same waves that broke his back last year, qualifying for the third round of Olympic surfing.

The Queenslander fractured two vertebrae in 2023 at the feared Teahupo’o break in Tahiti, which as part of French Polynesia is hosting surfing for theParis Games.

AAP

title: Paris Olympics 2024: Australian surfers Ethan Ewing and Tyler Wright win their heats
description: Ethan Ewing won his Olympics heat at the feared Teahupo’o break where he broke his back last year. Tyler Wright also survived mighty surf to go through.
